trending_topic: AI agents are shifting from hype to reality in March 2026, with tools like Bolt.new, Replit Agent, and v0.dev enabling non-technical users to build revenue-generating apps and websites without writing code. This is democratizing software development and creating new income streams.
money_tip: Use Perplexity's Pro search to research high-paying freelance niches in under 10 minutes instead of spending hours on Google. Ask it to analyze job board data, salary ranges, and skill gaps—then use Claude or ChatGPT to create targeted portfolio samples for those exact niches within a day.
free_tool_spotlight: HuggingChat - Completely free, open-source ChatGPT alternative with no usage limits, multiple AI models to choose from, and web search capabilities built-in.
